meaning: n.泻药,通便药adj.通便的,导泻的
examples: His laughter was cathartic, an animal yelp that brought tears to his eyes.
Tears can be cathartic and releasing.
It made the blues even more mournful, even more poignant and even more cathartic for anyone listening.
For a lot of people, psychiatrists say, talking about their experience can be cathartic.
